error_signature: passing the entire Xano user auth object instead of just the id
title: Incorrect user ID comparison in conditional styling
symptom: Messages are displayed in the same color regardless of user ID, indicating a failure in conditional styling logic.
applies_when: Using Xano to fetch user messages
not_this_if: User IDs are correctly compared and styled
root_cause: The issue arises when the entire user authentication object is passed instead of just the user ID. This leads to incorrect comparisons, causing all messages to display the same color.
fix_steps: Locate the part of the code where the user ID is being fetched from the Xano user auth object.
Modify the code to extract only the user ID (e.g., user.auth.id) instead of the entire object.
Test the conditional styling again to ensure messages display the correct colors.
agent_instruction: Ensure only the user ID is passed for comparison in the conditional styling logic.
